sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89651" key="prosko/smhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκόσμ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n89651.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">additional decoration</tr_>, Keil-Premerstein <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Dritter Bericht</tr_> No.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">117</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(i A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
